Party_Details.Name: TYC Investment Pte Ltd

Facts.Text: TYC Investment Pte Ltd was incorporated as a family holding company
On 2010-04-09, Henry Tay Yun Chwan and Chan Siew Lee entered into a Deed of Settlement to settle the division of their matrimonial assets and Chan Siew Lee's claim for maintenance
On 2012-05-15, Henry Tay Yun Chwan and Chan Siew Lee entered into an agreement to amend the Deed of Settlement and settle their litigation
TYC Deed was executed conferring rights and obligations on TYC
TYC lodged a notification with ACRA that JC had been disqualified as a director

Party_Details.Issue: Whether the directorship of a company is automatically vacated upon a bankruptcy order and if setting aside the order reinstates the directorship
Party_Details.Rule: A director's office becomes vacant upon bankruptcy unless the company's articles provide otherwise. Setting aside a bankruptcy order generally restores the original position
Party_Details.Application: JC' the setting aside should restore her directorship
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court found that the setting aside of the bankruptcy order reinstated JC as a director, as the articles did not preclude such reinstatement.

Party_Details.Name: Jannie Chan Siew Lee

Facts.Text: Jannie Chan Siew Lee was appointed as a permanent Governing Director of TYC
Jannie Chan Siew Lee was made bankrupt on 2016-09-29 pursuant to an application by ANZ Bank
Jannie Chan Siew Lee and Henry Tay Yun Chwan entered into a deed of settlement dated 2010-04-09 to settle the division of their matrimonial assets and Jannie Chan Siew Lee's claim for maintenance
Jannie Chan Siew Lee and Henry Tay Yun Chwan entered into an agreement dated 2012-05-15 to amend the deed of settlement and settle litigation between them

Party_Details.Issue: Whether a director automatically resumes their position upon the setting aside of a bankruptcy order
Party_Details.Rule: Setting aside a bankruptcy order generally restores the individual's original position unless the company's articles specify otherwise
Party_Details.Application: The dispute concerned whether the setting aside of the bankruptcy order automatically reinstated Jannie Chan Siew Lee as a director of TYC
Party_Details.Judicial_Reasoning_Log: The court held that the setting aside of the bankruptcy order reinstated JC as a director, as the articles did not preclude such reinstatement.
